description: Style NoteTaking the bright colours of summer and nature, vero moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with a range of colours from sophisticated black to subtle pastels and vibrant shades. So match the shade to your personality! Mix and match from a variety of colours and prints for a feminine look, or a modern twist.Product DetailsBeige sleeveless dress, has a round neckline with peach coloured piping around it, key hole detailed with a button at the nape of the neck, gathers at the waist which flair, belt loops with a peach belt through it, peach panel at the hemline and lining Material and Care100% polyesterMachine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dryUse cold iron Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M which measures 86 cm from the shoulders to the hemline
